title: abutilon dispermum
intro: Abutilon dispermum, also known as Country Mallow, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family, native to Australia and parts of Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions such as skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Abutilon dispermum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
